18+

Are you 18 or older?

DateScan is a Style & grooming coach for adults. Before you can use the camera scanner or AI Style Coach, please confirm your age.

By continuing, you confirm you are 18 or older. See our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

Before we turn on your camera

The live scanner runs entirely on your device. Here's what that means.

  • Scanning = local. Your camera image is analyzed exclusively by your browser, directly on your device. The data never leaves your device, so we never see it.
  • Nothing is saved. Frames live in your device's memory for a few seconds while the AI checks outfit, grooming, posture and lighting — then they're discarded.
  • You're in control. Stop the camera any time by closing the scanner. Your browser also lets you revoke camera permission at any moment.
  • Self-scan only. Point the camera at yourself, not other people. Scanning anyone else without their consent is forbidden by our Terms.
  • Note: The AI Style Coach chat is different — if you upload a photo there, that image is sent to our vision model. You'll see a separate notice the first time.

See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service for full details.

Before you upload

Quick rules for chat image uploads.

  • Your photos only. Upload photos you own or have the right to use. No celebrity, stock, or copyrighted images.
  • No people, no faces, no minors. Only the clothing item itself. Photos of people will be rejected.
  • Nothing sexual, violent, or illegal. The image is sent to a vision model for a single request and not stored on our servers beyond the response.
  • I am 18+ and I own or have the right to use the image.

Before you upload

Quick rules for closet uploads. Required before your first upload.

  • 1 Upload photos of your own clothes only. No celebrity, stock, or copyrighted images.
  • 2 No people, no faces, no minors. Only the clothing item itself. Photos of people will be rejected.
  • 3 Nothing sexual, violent, or illegal. Your uploads are stored locally on your device.
  • 4 I am 18+ and I own or have the right to use the image.

Privacy & Data

What leaves your device

  • ●
    Camera scan & analysis. Runs 100% on your device using MediaPipe + WebAssembly. Your video frames never leave the browser.
  • ●
    Closet & history. Stored locally in your browser's IndexedDB. Nothing is sent anywhere.
  • ●
    AI Style Coach Chat — text. Your messages are sent to api.datescan.app and forwarded to a vision-language model so you can get a reply.
  • ●
    AI Style Coach Chat — images. If you attach a photo or pick one from your closet, that image is uploaded with your message for the model to "see". It is processed for that single request and not retained on our server beyond the response. We do not use chat content to train models.
Private Mode

Blocks all image uploads in chat and forces the on-device AI to use the CPU backend (no GPU fingerprint surface).

Status: Off — image uploads in chat are allowed after consent.
Delete my account & data

View your account ID and permanently delete your account & all data (server-side and on this device) on our Privacy page.

📤

Send this image to the AI?

To analyze a photo in chat, we upload it to api.datescan.app, which forwards it to a vision-language model. The image is processed for this request only and not stored on our server beyond the response.

Report AI response

What's wrong with this reply?

Your report goes to our moderation team. We review every flagged response and use it to improve the Style Coach.

Reports are anonymous unless you're signed in.

We respect your privacy.

DateScan runs 100% in your browser — your photos never leave your device. We use strictly necessary cookies for security and payment processing. By continuing, you accept our Privacy Policy.
